title: Agent 007 Diagnostic Report
description: Written by Agent 007 after every activation. Records the full diagnosis, actions taken, and outcome. Stored at docs/agent-comms/.audit/007-{timestamp}.json. This is the durable audit trail for every 007 intervention.

report_id.description: Unique report ID matching the filename pattern: 007-{ISO_TIMESTAMP_DASHES}.json

check.description: Which auditor check triggered this activation.

spec_id.description: Spec ID affected. Null if the anomaly is not spec-specific.

agent.description: Which pipeline agent triggered the anomaly.

window.description: tmux window number of the affected agent.

timestamp.description: When the auditor detected the anomaly.

auditor_diagnostic.description: Full diagnostic output from the auditor check. Opaque to the schema — contents vary by check type.

pane_state.description: Observed state of the failing agent's tmux pane.

summary.description: 007's narrative diagnosis of what happened and why.

error_detected.description: Specific error message extracted from pane output. Null if no error visible.

last_output_lines.description: Last N lines captured from the failing agent's pane. Raw evidence.

root_cause_assessment.description: 007's best assessment of root cause. Null if unknown. Honesty protocol: if uncertain, say so here.

target.description: Target of the action — agent name for retry/skip, 'ntfy' for webhook, 'human' for escalate.

retry_count.description: For retry actions, which attempt number. Null for non-retry actions.

result.description: Whether the action succeeded: 'sent' (webhook/command delivered), 'written' (file created), 'pending' (retry initiated, outcome unknown), 'failed' (action itself failed).

detail.description: Additional context about the action result.

actions.description: Ordered list of all actions 007 took during this activation.

outcome.description: Final outcome of the 007 activation. 'error' means 007 itself encountered an issue during diagnosis.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock time from 007 activation to report completion.

retry_history.description: Previous retry attempts for this spec from the activation prompt. Empty on first trigger.
